summary: Iteration 100: Reports Date Range Filter feature tested. Backend API accepts date_from/date_to query parameters on /api/reports/generate endpoint. Frontend shows date From/To inputs, date range badge with Clear button, and passes dates to report generation. All 8 report types work with and without date filters.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/reports/generate correctly accepts date_from and date_to query parameters
Backend builds MongoDB $gte/$lte filter on created_at field for date filtering
Backend gracefully handles invalid date formats (ignores them)
Frontend SystemReports.jsx has dateFrom/dateTo state variables
Frontend shows date inputs with data-testid='reports-date-from' and 'reports-date-to'
Frontend shows date range badge when dates are set with Clear button
Frontend ReportModal receives dateFrom/dateTo props and passes them to API

All 8 report types (booking-report, revenue-analysis, financial-summary, customer-insights, operational-efficiency, service-performance, customer-satisfaction, booking-analytics) work with date filters

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All date filter UI elements verified

context_for_next_testing_agent: Reports date range filter feature fully implemented and working. Date From/To inputs appear in filter bar. Date range badge shows when dates are set with Clear button. Reports generated via Visual/Data buttons pass the selected date range to backend API. All 8 report types work correctly with and without date filters.

endpoints_tested: All 8 report types accept date_from/date_to parameters

features: Date From input (data-testid='reports-date-from') visible in filter bar
Date To input (data-testid='reports-date-to') visible in filter bar
Date range badge appears when dates are set showing 'YYYY-MM-DD → YYYY-MM-DD'
Clear dates button (data-testid='clear-date-filter') appears when dates are set
Clear dates button clears both date inputs and removes badge
Visual button opens report modal with date filter applied
Data button opens report modal with date filter applied
All 8 report cards visible with Visual, Data, Download buttons
